name: Vanity with Light Up Mirror, Storage Drawers and Power Strip - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Get ready for the day in style with this Vanity with Light Up Mirror and Power Strip from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted from wood, this rectangular vanity features an attached light-up mirror and power strip to create the ideal atmosphere and provide versatility for your beauty routine. Designed with a built-in outlet for extra convenience, the vanity table boasts two pull-out drawers to keep your makeup, jewelry and other essentials organized.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 39 inches
Overall Height: 54 inches
Overall Depth: 20 inches
Distance from floor to top panel: 30-1/2 inches
Distance from floor to front lower rail: 25-3/8 inches
Thickness of top panel: 5/8 inches
Width of top panel: 18-1/2 inches
Width of mirror: 32-7/8 inches
Height of mirror: 22-3/4 inches
Width of drawer front panel: 17-7/8 inches
Height of drawer front panel: 4-3/8 inches
Width of drawer box: 15-3/4 inches
Height of drawer box: 2-5/8 inches
Depth of drawer box: 11-3/4 inches
